# revolut_webhook (Data Source)

Look up a Revolut Merchant webhook by id, including its sensitive signing_secret.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "revolut_webhook" "existing" {
  id = "11111111-2222-3333-4444-555555555555"
}

output "webhook_events" {
  value = data.revolut_webhook.existing.events
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Webhook UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `events` (Set of String) Subscribed event types.
- `signing_secret` (String, Sensitive) Server-generated signing secret (wsk_...).
- `url` (String) HTTPS endpoint.
